The '''Aqualis Food Conglomerate''' was a corporation on [[Baralou]] that generated [[Foodstuff/Legends|foodstuffs]] from the life in the seas on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. It was also a front for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], and was the official owner of [[Aqualis Base]]

{{Company-stub}}
